package models

import "time"

// Anti-pattern: GORM model accumulates transport-layer binding and validation tags.
// The persistence struct carries `binding:"required"` (Gin) and `validate:"..."` (go-playground/validator)
// concerns that belong in a separate request DTO.

type User struct {
	ID        uint      `gorm:"primaryKey" json:"id"`
	Email     string    `gorm:"column:email;uniqueIndex" json:"email" binding:"required" validate:"required,email"`
	Password  string    `gorm:"column:password" json:"-" binding:"required" validate:"required,min=8"`
	Name      string    `gorm:"column:name" json:"name" binding:"required" validate:"required,min=2"`
	Age       int       `gorm:"column:age" json:"age" validate:"omitempty,min=0,max=150"`
	CreatedAt time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at" json:"created_at"`
}
